data.content: Plan needs revision: RetakesView does not currently fetch the full beat graph; it only loads retake-source beats. Building parentByBeatId from that filtered set would miss deeper rolling ancestors when an intermediate parent is not itself a retake candidate. Revise the plan to source full ancestry data (or pass/reuse a complete parent map from shared beats data) before reusing Take! ancestor blocking, and add a test covering a rolling grandparent with a non-retake intermediate parent.
